entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `steps_to_reproduce` TEXT NOT NULL, `actual_result` TEXT NOT NULL, `expected_result` TEXT NOT NULL, `device_info` TEXT NOT NULL, `app_info` TEXT NOT NULL, `screenshots` TEXT NOT NULL, `annotated_screenshot_path` TEXT, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `export_format` TEXT, `tags` TEXT NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `synced_at` INTEGER)

indices.name: index_bug_reports_status
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_bug_reports_status` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`status`)

indices.name: index_bug_reports_created_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_bug_reports_created_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`created_at`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `usage_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_bug_reports_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `bug_reports` BEGIN DELETE FROM `bug_reports_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_bug_reports_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `bug_reports` BEGIN DELETE FROM `bug_reports_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_bug_reports_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `bug_reports` BEGIN INSERT INTO `bug_reports_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `steps_to_reproduce`, `actual_result`, `expected_result`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`steps_to_reproduce`, NEW.`actual_result`, NEW.`expected_result`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_bug_reports_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `bug_reports` BEGIN INSERT INTO `bug_reports_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `steps_to_reproduce`, `actual_result`, `expected_result`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`steps_to_reproduce`, NEW.`actual_result`, NEW.`expected_result`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `steps_to_reproduce` TEXT NOT NULL, `actual_result` TEXT NOT NULL, `expected_result` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`bug_reports`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
